items.title: Anthropic raises $65 Billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
items.raw_content: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.
items.summary: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

items.title: YouTube will let you ask AI to make a custom video feed
items.raw_content: YouTube is launching a new AI feature that creates a personalized video feed based on descriptions of what you want to watch. In its announcement, YouTube says custom content feeds can be built around your specific interests, moods, or favorite topics, which you can then pin to the top of your YouTube homepage - making […]

items.title: Claude’s new model is more ‘honest’ when it messes up
items.raw_content: Anthropic is releasing Claude Opus 4.8 on Thursday, and the company is touting the model's "honesty." According to Anthropic, it trains "all [its] models to be honest - for instance, to avoid making claims that they can't support." But it notes that "a general problem with AI models is that they sometimes jump to conclusions, […]

items.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
items.raw_content: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.
items.summary: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

items.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
items.raw_content: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

items.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
items.raw_content: Microsoft is launching a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, according to Microsoft. The redesign, which is rolling out across desktop and mobile devices, comes […]

items.title: Rivian’s software chief thinks you don’t need CarPlay or buttons
items.raw_content: Today, I’m talking with Wassym Bensaid, the chief software officer at Rivian, and the co-CEO of Rivian’s platform joint venture with Volkswagen, which everyone just calls RV Tech. items.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder Stack AI
items.raw_content: Asana will incorporate Stack AI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.
items.summary: Asana will incorporate Stack AI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

items.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary
items.raw_content: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.
items.summary: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

items.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
items.raw_content: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

items.raw_content: Apple's long-awaited Siri overhaul, expected to arrive in iOS 27, might look a lot like ChatGPT with a splash of Liquid Glass. items.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
items.raw_content: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.
items.summary: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

items.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
items.raw_content: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.
items.summary: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

items.title: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
items.raw_content: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets. The 75-minute film is a fictional dramatization of the Iranian government's mass killing of protestors in January, with the people and images fully created by AI, as reported earlier by The Hollywood Reporter. Dreams of Violets cost $2,000 to make […]

items.title: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
items.raw_content: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Thursday, also alleges that Perplexity provides users with information locked behind CNN's subscription. Perplexity, which offers an AI "answer" engine along with […]

items.title: YouTube takes baby steps to being a real podcast app
items.raw_content: New features coming to YouTube could make it better for listening to podcasts, rolling out to Premium subscribers starting today on Android and coming later to iOS. items.title: Robinhood will let your AI agent trade stocks and make (or lose) lots of money
items.raw_content: Robinhood is opening its trading platform to AI agents. In an announcement on Wednesday, Robinhood says traders can now create a separate account for an AI agent and add a specific amount of money, allowing the agent to buy and sell stocks across the market. items.title: AI tried to bury this politician — now people have actually heard of him
items.raw_content: By the time that the Democratic primary for New York's 12th congressional district wraps up in June, Anthropic and OpenAI will have spent millions on their battle over the political future of AI: who gets to regulate it, or who will be punished for trying to regulate it.
